title: Best VPN for Netflix in 2026 (We Tested 5 Options)
description: Not every VPN unblocks Netflix, and the ones that do aren't always fast enough to watch without buffering. We tested five VPNs and found which one actually works.
content:
## The Problem With VPNs and Netflix

Netflix blocks most VPN IP addresses. It's been doing this since 2016, and the arms race between Netflix and VPN providers hasn't stopped. A VPN that worked last month might not work today.

We test each VPN on this list monthly. Here's what we found in January 2026.

## Our Top Pick: NordVPN

NordVPN unblocked Netflix US, UK, Japan, and Germany in every test we ran. Speeds were consistently above 80 Mbps on a 100 Mbps connection, which means 4K without buffering.

The SmartPlay feature routes streaming traffic automatically. You don't need to pick a special server or change any settings.

**Best for:** Streaming Netflix from any country

## Runner-Up: ExpressVPN

ExpressVPN also unblocked every Netflix region we tested, and it's slightly faster on single-connection speed tests. The downside is price: it costs more per month than NordVPN.

If speed is your only concern and budget isn't, ExpressVPN is the better pick.

## What We Tested

For each VPN we checked:

- **US Netflix**: comedy and drama titles not available outside the US
- **UK Netflix**: BBC co-productions exclusive to the UK library
- **Japan Netflix**: anime titles with JP-only licensing
- **Germany Netflix**: German-language originals

We also measured:

- Download speed while streaming (Mbps)
- Time to load a 4K title
- Whether the proxy error appeared

## VPNs That Didn't Pass

Two services we tested got caught by Netflix's proxy detection within the first five minutes:

- One free VPN service showed the "You seem to be using an unblocker" error immediately
- A budget VPN we tested worked on some US servers but not others, making it unreliable

Reliability matters as much as compatibility. A VPN that works 70% of the time is worse than one that works consistently.

## Bottom Line

NordVPN is the safest pick if unblocking Netflix is your goal. It's consistently reliable, fast enough for 4K, and handles multiple regions. ExpressVPN is a valid alternative if you're willing to pay more for marginally better speed.
